expectations.text: Scope mode is detected as 'file' (ad-hoc codebase review of specific directories, no diff scoping)
expectations.evidence: scope-determination.md identifies the two specific directories and their SKILL.md files. Notes 'The task specified two explicit directory paths' — correctly identified file mode.

expectations.text: Scope references the two specific skill directories (standard-review and security-review)
expectations.evidence: scope-determination.md lists both: '.claude/plugins/code-steward-reviews/skills/standard-review/' and '.claude/plugins/code-steward-reviews/skills/security-review/' with file details.

expectations.text: All 6 review types are selected (user said 'comprehensive')
expectations.evidence: Performed a comprehensive multi-dimensional review covering 8 review dimensions, but did not formally separate into the 6 defined review types (standard, security, performance, architecture, test-coverage, silent-failure). No review-selection output produced.

expectations.text: A final report file (final-report.md) exists with review findings
expectations.evidence: final-report.md exists with 17 total findings (4 High, 13 Medium) including cross-skill consistency issues.
